title: helmets become crowns
description: A simple pack to change gold, iron, diamond, and netherite helmets to crowns by naming them in an anvil.
body:
This is for people who want to add a bit of a fantasy vibe / royalty mideaval vibe.
\
\
\
\
This pack requires **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)** for forge/vanilla or **[CitResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** for fabric in order to function properly.
\
\
\
\
To get the textures rename the following items to the names below using an anvil:

- Golden Helmet > **Gold Crown**

- Iron Helmet > **Iron Crown**

- Diamond Helmet > **Diamond Crown**

- Netherite Helmet > **Netherite Crown**

Note: will probably not update this anymore, I want to work on other things.
---

You may use this for personal use only and in modpacks. Do not change the textures. Do not re-upload elswhere. If you showcase this in a Youtube video let me know! Thank you. :)
